code_changes: Added backend-aware saga claim candidate SQL.
Added backend-aware saga stale recovery candidate SQL.
Added backend-aware saga cancel candidate SQL.
Wired SagaRepository.claim, recover_stale, and cancel_all through the helpers.
Postgres claim/recovery/cancel candidates now use FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED and JSONB/timestamptz dialect where applicable.
